name: Blender Plugin
description: Deep Blender integration for technical artists — scene control, rendering pipelines, asset management, and game export via the Blender Python API.

blender.executablePath.label: Blender Executable Path
blender.executablePath.help: Absolute path to the Blender executable (e.g. /Applications/Blender.app/Contents/MacOS/Blender).

blender.bridgeHost.label: Bridge Host
blender.bridgeHost.help: Host where the OpenClaw Blender addon bridge is listening (default: 127.0.0.1).

blender.bridgePort.label: Bridge Port
blender.bridgePort.help: Port where the OpenClaw Blender addon bridge is listening (default: 7428).
